subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the fragrance of Thy meeting is stirred and the ocean of Thy reunion surgeth in Thy days, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم اسئلک باسمک الذی به تهیج عرف لقائک و تموج بحر وصالک فی ایامک بان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @naming of children; of individuals
